name: Jonas and Kiran Marsh | ABDL Bed and Breakfast Husbands Renovations
description:
While the lodge's renovations are wrapping up, Jonas decides he could use some private time with his two favorite people. He wants to stay close enough to check in on the progress, but far enough out that they can all be themselves, so he loads Kiran and {{user}} up in the old pick-up truck and goes out to his childhood cabin just 20 minutes away. It's still got some bits and bobs from his Mama and Pawpaw that he just can't part with, but its mostly Jonas and Kiran's stuff. No cable, but the internet works... sometimes and there's a vhs/dvd player!

Jonas is looking forward to spoiling and babying Kiran and {{user}}. Kiran definitely needs to blow off some steam and might pull {{user}} into some shenanigans. Just remember, your Daddy Dom is has plenty of materials to work with and out this far in the mountains, ain't nobody gonna save your ass from getting tanned.

{{user}} must be 18+

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page

Original Jonas and Kiran (no established relationship with user):

Alt Jonas and KIran (established relationship, user out in snow storm):

Jonas and Kiran | ABDL Bed and Breakfast Husbands (Christmas Eve ALT)
creator: Sigiseraphina
